channel.title: Meta-analysis on Nils Myszkowski, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Meta-analysis on Nils Myszkowski, PhD

item.title: Creativity and Unethicality – A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
item.description: What it’s about In this paper, we provide a meta-analysis of correlations between (un)ethical behavior and creativity, notably controlling for how the constructs were measured – which, as it turns out, is important when considering the heterogeneity of the findings. Abstract A growing line of research suggests that creativity and unethicality are intrinsically related to one another. However, the idea has been challenged both by theoretical arguments and by heterogeneous empirical findings.

item.title: A Meta-Analysis of the Relationship Between Intelligence and Different Measures of Creative Potential
item.description: What it’s about In this paper, we examine a meta-analysis of the relationship between intelligence and different measures of creative potential. Abstract This paper examines the focal construct and reports empirical and/or psychometric evidence relevant to its interpretation. The findings contribute to the literature by clarifying measurement, theoretical implications, and practical applications in context. How to access the paper You can access the full paper here.
